rationale: The definition is 'a wff with at least one free variable', so it rests directly on the free-variable notion def:fv, which is missing. def:wff-pred (the 'wff' substrate) is correctly present.
notes: Redundancy flag (not enacted): def:predicate is itself titled 'Open Formula' (the syntactic-predicate sense), and this node is also titled 'Open Formula' -- two same-named nodes. def:predicate reads as a parallel/duplicate concept rather than a constituent of this definition, so it may be a mis-attached cross-link; kept here pending reviewer deduplication rather than removed on uncertain grounds.
